hero.headline: Your Dream Backyard, Built to Last
hero.subheadline: From custom pools to complete outdoor living spaces, Outdoor Innovations transforms Minnesota backyards into private retreats. Two decades of craftsmanship, one team dedicated to getting every detail right.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Complete Outdoor Living<br class="hidden md:block"> From Vision to Reality
services.subtitle: Stop imagining what your backyard could be. Our team of designers and craftsmen handle every detail, from the first sketch to the final stone, so you can start living outdoors sooner.

cards.title: Custom In-Ground Pools
cards.description: Tailored pool designs for Minnesota backyards. We handle everything from excavation to finishing so you get the private oasis you have been dreaming about.

cards.title: Outdoor Kitchens & Bars
cards.description: Fully equipped cooking and entertaining spaces featuring grills, countertops, and bars. Host unforgettable gatherings right in your backyard.

cards.title: Decks & Porches
cards.description: Custom-built structures that seamlessly connect your home to your landscape, creating the perfect transition from indoor comfort to outdoor beauty.

cards.title: Patios & Hardscaping
cards.description: ICPI-certified paver installations, walkways, and hardscape elements that add lasting beauty and durability to your outdoor space.

cards.title: Fire & Water Features
cards.description: Custom fire pits, fireplaces, fountains, and water features that create ambiance and become the centerpiece of your outdoor living area.

cards.title: Pergolas & Pool Houses
cards.description: Architectural shade structures and functional pool houses that add character, shelter, and year-round usability to your backyard retreat.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to Your Dream Backyard

steps.title: Share Your Vision
steps.description: Tell us how you want to live outdoors. Our designers visit your property, listen to your ideas, and create a custom plan that fits your space, style, and budget.

steps.title: Watch It Come to Life
steps.description: Our experienced crews — led by foremen with 10+ years of experience — build your project with premium materials and meticulous attention to every detail.

steps.title: Make Memories
steps.description: Step into a backyard that feels like a resort. Host, relax, and enjoy the outdoor living space your family deserves. We stand behind every project we build.

about.label: Why Minnesota Trusts Us
about.headline: Two Founders, One Shared Passion for Outdoor Living
about.description: Co-founders Asher Judd and Craig Palmer each ran successful landscaping companies for six years before joining forces in 2007 to create Outdoor Innovations. With headquarters in Hugo and Excelsior, their team of experienced designers and craftsmen has been transforming Twin Cities backyards into luxurious outdoor retreats ever since. Every project is custom-designed, built with premium materials, and backed by nearly two decades of hands-on expertise.

features.title: 19 Years of Proven Expertise
features.description: Founded in 2007 by two veteran landscapers, our foremen average 10+ years of experience building Minnesota outdoor living spaces.

features.title: Full-Service Customization
features.description: From pools and patios to kitchens and fire features, one team handles your entire project. No subcontractors, no finger-pointing.

features.title: Certified Quality Guarantee
features.description: ICPI-certified installers, MNLA members, and premium materials on every job. We build it right the first time, every time.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Premium Craftsmanship.
pricing.subtitle: Every project is custom-designed for your space. Request a free consultation and we will provide a detailed, no-surprise quote.

guarantee.headline: Our "Built to Last" Promise
guarantee.description: We stand behind every project with the same pride we had laying the first stone in 2007. If any element of our craftsmanship does not meet the standard we promised, we come back and make it right at no additional cost. Your backyard is our reputation, and we protect both.

faqs.question: How long does a typical backyard project take?
faqs.answer: Timelines vary by scope. A patio or fire feature might take 1-2 weeks, while a full backyard transformation with pool, kitchen, and hardscaping can take 6-10 weeks. We provide a detailed timeline during your design consultation so there are no surprises.

faqs.question: Do you handle the entire project or just parts of it?
faqs.answer: We are a full-service outdoor living company. Pools, patios, kitchens, fire features, decks, pergolas — our team handles everything in-house. One point of contact, one crew, one company standing behind the finished result.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the entire Twin Cities metro area including Minneapolis, Saint Paul, Woodbury, Minnetonka, Stillwater, Eagan, and Lake Elmo, plus Western Wisconsin communities like Hudson and New Richmond. Our two offices in Hugo and Excelsior keep us close to our clients.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing landscape?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Many of our projects involve enhancing or transforming existing outdoor spaces. Our designers assess your current landscape and create a plan that works with what you have while bringing your new vision to life.

faqs.question: What certifications does your team hold?
faqs.answer: We are ICPI certified (Interlocking Concrete Pavement Institute), members of the Minnesota Nursery and Landscape Association (MNLA), and NFIB members. Our foremen average over 10 years of experience in outdoor construction.

testimonials.name: Catherine R.
testimonials.text: We just finished a backyard pool project with Outdoor Innovations and it turned out absolutely beautiful! The team was professional from start to finish and the result exceeded our expectations.

testimonials.name: Catherine J.
testimonials.text: Asher's teams thoughtfully, artistically, and precisely placed each piece with great care. The attention to detail was remarkable and our patio looks like it belongs in a magazine.

testimonials.name: Karen M.
testimonials.text: From the initial design to completion, the professionalism and expertise were evident every step of the way. They truly care about delivering a backyard you will love for years.

contact.headline:
Ready to Transform
Your Backyard?
contact.subtitle: Get a free design consultation with our team. We will visit your property, listen to your vision, and create a custom plan — no pressure, no obligations.
